allow: PowerShell($candidates = @\("C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr", "C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jre", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Android Studio\\jbr"\) + \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Java" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }\) + \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Eclipse Adoptium" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path "$c\\bin\\java.exe"\) { Write-Output $c } })
